description: Create a two-column content slide on expectations for world security in 2024, with explanatory text on the left and a line chart of global average agreement from 2021 to 2024 on the right.

header.headline: Expectations for world security in 2024 in an historical context

items.text: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements...?

series.name: A rogue artificial intelligence program that can’t be shut down will cause significant havoc globally

footer.source: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024. © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report
